tasks.prompt: Use grep to search swival/agent.py for tool_descriptions case-insensitively with one context line. In 5 bullets or fewer, report the number of matches shown and name two nearby functions or constants. Do not edit files.

Use outline in batch mode on swival/agent.py and swival/benchmark.py with depth 1. In 5 bullets or fewer, say which file defines run_agent_loop and which file defines summarize_outputs. Do not edit files.
Use read_file with tail to read the last 40 lines of swival/benchmark.py. In 5 bullets or fewer, name the final CLI entrypoint functions visible there. Do not edit files.
